name: BBenCut
author: Ben Casey (bencodec)
description: Applies the BBCut breakbeat-cutting algorithms (a SuperCollider library by Nick Collins, ported to TypeScript) to audio clips in Live's Arrangement View via a right-click action. Offers ten configurable cut procedures (BBCutProc11, WarpCutProc1, SQPusher, CageCut, etc.) and non-destructively replaces the clip with a sequence of rearranged looping clips.
